Q1 2025 Earnings Call Transcript

Operator: Good afternoon and welcome to the Example Corp first quarter 2025 earnings conference call.

Jane Doe - Chief Executive Officer: Thank you. Revenue grew 12% year over year and demand remained broad based across enterprise and commercial customers.

John Smith - Chief Financial Officer: We are raising full-year guidance for revenue to $10.0 billion to $10.4 billion and expect operating margin to expand through the year.

Jane Doe - Chief Executive Officer: Our pipeline is healthy and we continue to invest in product innovation while maintaining disciplined expense control.

John Smith - Chief Financial Officer: Free cash flow was $1.2 billion in the quarter and we returned $400 million to shareholders through repurchases.

Question-and-Answer Session

Analyst: Can you discuss margin trends and what is embedded in guidance?

Jane Doe - Chief Executive Officer: Margins expanded 80 basis points due to operating leverage and favorable mix.

John Smith - Chief Financial Officer: Guidance assumes modest improvement in gross margin and stable operating expenses as a percentage of revenue.

Analyst: How should we think about the competitive environment this year?

Jane Doe - Chief Executive Officer: Competition remains intense, but our platform differentiation and customer retention metrics continue to improve.

Operator: This concludes today's call. Thank you for participating.

Prepared remarks contained forward-looking statements regarding future financial performance, product roadmap timing, and macroeconomic assumptions that could cause actual results to differ materially.
